count_rules.guidance: Use COUNT(*) when the user asks for raw row count of dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE.
Use COUNT(DISTINCT ARIF_ID) when the user asks for distinct entities represented by dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE.
Use COUNT(*) when the user asks for raw row count of dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_EDUCATION.
Use COUNT(DISTINCT SCHOOL_ID) when the user asks for distinct entities represented by dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_EDUCATION.
Use COUNT(*) when the user asks for raw row count of dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_EXPERIENCE.
Use COUNT(DISTINCT JOB_ID) when the user asks for distinct entities represented by dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_EXPERIENCE.
Use COUNT(*) when the user asks for raw row count of dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_SKILLS.
Use COUNT(DISTINCT SKILL_ID) when the user asks for distinct entities represented by dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_SKILLS.

dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE.grouped_count:
SELECT TOP 50 [ARIF_ID] AS group_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM [dbo].[T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE]
WHERE [ARIF_ID] IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY [ARIF_ID]
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE.latest_records:
SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM [dbo].[T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE]
WHERE [CREATED_ON] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY [CREATED_ON] DESC;
dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE.top_by_numeric_metric:
SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM [dbo].[T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE]
WHERE [CANDIDATE_ID] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY [CANDIDATE_ID] DESC;
dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE.grouped_numeric_summary:
SELECT TOP 50 [ARIF_ID] AS group_value,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       AVG(CAST([CANDIDATE_ID] AS float)) AS avg_value,
       MIN([CANDIDATE_ID]) AS min_value,
       MAX([CANDIDATE_ID]) AS max_value
FROM [dbo].[T_IIR_ARIF_CANDIDATE]
WHERE [ARIF_ID] IS NOT NULL
  AND [CANDIDATE_ID] IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY [ARIF_ID]
ORDER BY AVG(CAST([CANDIDATE_ID] AS float)) DESC;

dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_EDUCATION.grouped_count:
SELECT TOP 50 [SCHOOL_ID] AS group_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM [dbo].[T_IIR_ARIF_EDUCATION]
WHERE [SCHOOL_ID] IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY [SCHOOL_ID]
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_EDUCATION.latest_records:
SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM [dbo].[T_IIR_ARIF_EDUCATION]
WHERE [NORM_STARTDATE] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY [NORM_STARTDATE] DESC;
dbo.T_IIR_ARIF_EDUCATION.top_by_numeric_metric:

ORDER BY [ARIF_ID] DESC;

       MIN([ARIF_ID]) AS min_value,
       MAX([ARIF_ID]) AS max_value
FROM [dbo].[T_IIR_ARIF_EDUCATION]
WHERE [SCHOOL_ID] IS NOT NULL
  AND [ARIF_ID] IS NOT NULL

rules: Only generate SQL against listed tables and columns.
Prefer explicit joins using discovered foreign keys and join_hints.
Use entity_key_analysis to decide when COUNT(DISTINCT ...) is safer than COUNT(*).
Use count_rules to avoid duplicate counting after joins.
Use query_templates as safe starting patterns.
Use recommended_filter_columns for WHERE clauses when appropriate.
Use recommended_search_columns for text search when appropriate.
Pattern profiles describe the typical structure of text values.
Sample values intentionally exclude poor-quality and Arabic-script examples.
